_comment: BEST config from the 2026-06-19 pilot architecture/training search (combo_eck): test-split relRMSE 0.167 = 3.24x over the k16/100ep baseline (R2 0.97). DIRECTIONAL / NON-CERTIFYING (pilot, 1208 cases). Generalizing levers vs train_merged.json: (1) checkpoint_metric=energy_relrmse — select on the DEPLOYED metric, not the latent-dominated total val loss (the safe, no-CFD-cost win; carry forward regardless); (2) latent_dim 16->32 + rate_hidden (256,256,128) — NOTE k=32 doubles CFD UDS transport cost, and the small-pilot variance inflated its benefit, so RE-ABLATE k=16 vs 32 on the regenerated DB; (3) tail_weight_alpha 2->4 + energy_weight 0.5->1.0 — cheap loss-emphasis, re-ablate; (4) epochs 800 + cosine LR. keq_weight=0 (validated off). NEGATIVE results: weight_decay>1e-6 hurts, off-manifold augmentation hurts, training the k16 baseline longer overfits. The remaining gap to 10x is on-manifold case count: test relRMSE ~ 152*N_cases^-0.97 -> 10x at ~3500 cases; the full-tier regenerated DB (~23500 cases) clears that. Re-confirm everything on the regenerated front-adaptive DB.
